sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27845" key="dokeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοκεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27845.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δοκός</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
